questions.question_en: How many Persons are in the Holy Trinity?
questions.question_am: በቅድስት ሥላሴ ውስጥ ስንት አካላት አሉ?
questions.explanation_en: The Holy Trinity is three Persons — Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — in one God.
questions.explanation_am: ቅድስት ሥላሴ በአንድ አምላክ ውስጥ ሦስት አካላት ናቸው — አብ፣ ወልድ እና መንፈስ ቅዱስ።

questions.question_en: What does the Ethiopian word 'Selassie' (ሥላሴ) mean?
questions.explanation_en: Selassie means Trinity, referring to the three Persons of God: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit.
questions.explanation_am: ሥላሴ ማለት ሦስትነት (Trinity) ማለት ሲሆን የእግዚአብሔርን ሦስት አካላት ይመለከታል፡ አብ፣ ወልድ እና መንፈስ ቅዱስ።

questions.explanation_en: Tewahedo means 'being made one' — it refers to Christ's divine and human natures being united in one.
questions.explanation_am: ተዋሕዶ ማለት 'አንድ መሆን' ማለት ሲሆን የክርስቶስ መለኮታዊና ሰብአዊ ባሕርያት በአንድ መዋሐዳቸውን ይመለከታል።

questions.question_en: Who is the mother of Jesus Christ?
questions.explanation_en: The Virgin Mary, called Theotokos (God-bearer) or Waladiite Amlak in Ethiopian tradition, gave birth to Jesus Christ by the power of the Holy Spirit.
questions.explanation_am: ወላዲተ አምላክ ተብላ የምትጠራው ድንግል ማርያም በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን ወለደች።

questions.question_en: On which two days do Orthodox Christians fast every week?
questions.question_am: ኦርቶዶክሳውያን ክርስቲያኖች በየሳምንቱ በየትኞቹ ሁለት ቀናት ይጾማሉ?
questions.explanation_en: Orthodox Christians fast on Wednesdays (when Judas betrayed Jesus) and Fridays (when Jesus died on the cross).
questions.explanation_am: ኦርቶዶክሳውያን ክርስቲያኖች ረቡዕ (ይሁዳ ኢየሱስን ያስረከበበት) እና ዓርብ (ኢየሱስ በመስቀል ላይ የሞተበት) ይጾማሉ።

questions.question_en: How many days is the Great Lent (Abiy Tsom) before Easter?
questions.question_am: ከፋሲካ በፊት ያለው ዐቢይ ጾም ስንት ቀናት ነው?
questions.explanation_en: The Great Lent in the Ethiopian Orthodox Church is 55 days, longer than in some other traditions.
questions.explanation_am: በኢትዮጵያ ኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ዐቢይ ጾም 55 ቀናት ሲሆን ከሌሎች ወጎች የረዘመ ነው።

questions.question_en: In which direction do Orthodox Christians face when they pray?
questions.question_am: ኦርቶዶክሳውያን ክርስቲያኖች ሲጸልዩ ወደ የትኛው አቅጣጫ ይዞራሉ?
questions.explanation_en: Orthodox Christians face east when praying, toward the rising sun, which symbolizes Christ the Light of the World.
questions.explanation_am: ኦርቶዶክሳውያን ክርስቲያኖች የዓለም ብርሃን ክርስቶስን የሚያመለክተውን ፀሐይ መውጫ ወደ ምሥራቅ ዞረው ይጸልያሉ።

questions.question_en: What is the Ethiopian prayer rope called?
questions.explanation_en: The mequteria is a prayer rope used by Ethiopian Orthodox Christians to count prayers and stay focused during worship.
questions.explanation_am: መቁጠሪያ የኢትዮጵያ ኦርቶዶክስ ክርስቲያኖች ጸሎቶችን ለመቁጠርና በአምልኮ ወቅት ለማተኮር የሚጠቀሙበት የጸሎት ገመድ ነው።

questions.question_en: How many sacraments (mysteries) does the Orthodox Church have?
questions.question_am: የኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ስንት ቅዱሳት ምሥጢራት አሏት?
questions.explanation_en: The Orthodox Church has seven sacraments: Baptism, Confirmation, Eucharist, Confession, Anointing of the Sick, Marriage, and Holy Orders.
questions.explanation_am: ኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ሰባት ምሥጢራት አሏት፡ ጥምቀት፣ ሜሮን፣ ቅዱስ ቁርባን፣ ንስሐ፣ የሕሙማን ቅባት፣ ጋብቻ እና ክህነት።

questions.question_en: At how many days old are boys baptized in the Ethiopian Orthodox Church?
questions.question_am: በኢትዮጵያ ኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ወንድ ልጆች በስንት ቀናቸው ይጠመቃሉ?
questions.explanation_en: In the Ethiopian Orthodox tradition, boys are baptized at 40 days old and girls at 80 days old.
questions.explanation_am: በኢትዮጵያ ኦርቶዶክስ ወግ ወንዶች በ40 ቀናቸው ሴቶች በ80 ቀናቸው ይጠመቃሉ።

questions.question_en: Who was the first Bishop of Ethiopia?
questions.explanation_en: Frumentius, also known as Abba Selama (Father of Peace), was ordained by Saint Athanasius as the first Bishop of Ethiopia around 330 AD.
questions.explanation_am: ፍሬምናጦስ አባ ሰላማ (የሰላም አባት) በመባልም የሚታወቀው በ330 ዓ.ም. አካባቢ በቅዱስ አትናቴዎስ እጅ የኢትዮጵያ የመጀመሪያ ጳጳስ ሆኖ ተሾመ።

questions.question_en: What did Saint Yared create for the Ethiopian Church?
questions.question_am: ቅዱስ ያሬድ ለኢትዮጵያ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ምን ፈጠረ?
questions.explanation_en: Saint Yared created the unique musical tradition of the Ethiopian Orthodox Church, including three styles of chanting still used today.
questions.explanation_am: ቅዱስ ያሬድ ዛሬም ድረስ ጥቅም ላይ የሚውሉ ሦስት የዝማሬ ዘይቤዎችን ጨምሮ የኢትዮጵያ ኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያንን ልዩ የሙዚቃ ባህል ፈጠረ።

questions.question_en: What happened on the Day of Pentecost?
options_en: The Holy Spirit came upon the Apostles
questions.explanation_en: On the Day of Pentecost, the Holy Spirit descended on the Apostles like tongues of fire, giving them the power to preach. This is considered the birthday of the Church.
questions.explanation_am: በጴንጤቆስጤ ቀን መንፈስ ቅዱስ እንደ እሳት ልሳን በሐዋርያት ላይ ወረደ የመስበክ ኃይል ሰጣቸው። ይህ የቤተ ክርስቲያን የልደት ቀን ተደርጎ ይቆጠራል።

options_en: He had a golden voice / was a great preacher
He found gold in a church
He lived in a golden palace
options_am: ወርቃማ ድምፅ ስለነበረው / ታላቅ ሰባኪ ስለነበር
questions.explanation_en: Chrysostom means 'Golden Mouth' in Greek. Saint John earned this name because he was the greatest preacher of the early Church.
questions.explanation_am: አፈወርቅ ማለት 'የወርቅ አፍ' ማለት ነው። ቅዱስ ዮሐንስ ይህን ስም ያገኘው የጥንታዊት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ታላቅ ሰባኪ ስለነበር ነው።

questions.question_en: Which Church Father defended the faith at the Council of Nicaea?
questions.question_am: በኒቅያ ጉባኤ ሃይማኖትን የተከላከለው የትኛው የቤተ ክርስቲያን አባት ነው?
questions.explanation_en: Saint Athanasius, even as a young deacon, bravely defended the true faith against Arianism at the Council of Nicaea in 325 AD.
questions.explanation_am: ቅዱስ አትናቴዎስ ገና ወጣት ዲያቆን ሳለ በ325 ዓ.ም. በኒቅያ ጉባኤ ላይ እውነተኛውን ሃይማኖት ከአርዮሳዊነት በድፍረት ተከላከለ።

questions.question_en: Who built the rock-hewn churches in Ethiopia?
questions.question_am: በኢትዮጵያ ውቅር አብያተ ክርስቲያናትን ማን ገነባ?
questions.explanation_en: King Lalibela built eleven incredible churches carved from solid rock around 1200 AD, creating a 'New Jerusalem' in Ethiopia.
questions.explanation_am: ንጉሥ ላሊበላ በ1200 ዓ.ም. አካባቢ ከጠጣር ድንጋይ ተፈልፍለው የተሠሩ አስራ አንድ አስደናቂ አብያተ ክርስቲያናትን በመገንባት በኢትዮጵያ 'አዲስ ኢየሩሳሌም' ፈጠረ።

options_en: A symbol of bread and wine
The true Body and Blood of Christ
questions.explanation_en: The Orthodox Church teaches that the Eucharist is truly the Body and Blood of Christ — not just a symbol, but a real holy mystery.
questions.explanation_am: ኦርቶዶክስ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ቅዱስ ቁርባን በእውነት የክርስቶስ ሥጋውና ደሙ መሆኑን ታስተምራለች — ምልክት ብቻ ሳይሆን እውነተኛ ቅዱስ ምሥጢር።

questions.question_en: Which council declared Mary as 'Theotokos' (Mother of God)?
questions.question_am: ማርያምን 'ወላዲተ አምላክ' ብሎ ያወጀው የትኛው ጉባኤ ነው?
questions.explanation_en: The Council of Ephesus in 431 AD, led by Saint Cyril of Alexandria, declared that Mary is truly the Theotokos — the Mother of God.
questions.explanation_am: በቅዱስ ቄርሎስ ዘእስክንድርያ የተመራው የ431 ዓ.ም. የኤፌሶን ጉባኤ ማርያም በእውነት ወላዲተ አምላክ መሆኗን አወጀ።
